title: Infosys to Hold Investor AI Day in Bengaluru on February 17, 2026
detailed_summary: Infosys announced that it will hold an Investor AI day in Bengaluru on February 17, 2026. The agenda will be finalized later. The event proceedings will be webcast live on the company’s website, and event presentations and discussion transcripts will be hosted on the website subsequently.

key_facts.fact: Infosys will hold an Investor AI day in Bengaluru on February 17, 2026.
The agenda of the event will be finalized in due course.
The proceedings of the event will be webcast live on the Company's website, and the presentations and transcripts will be hosted subsequently.
